title: Didn't Catch That
scene: 收银员说话太快，你没听清总价。

turns.cn: 一共二十三块四，要袋子吗？
不好意思，能说慢一点吗？一共多少？
turns.en: Sorry, could you slow down? How much was the total?

title: Ask to Spell It
scene: 前台登记名字，你没听清怎么拼。

turns.en: How do you spell your last name?

turns.cn: W-e-i，伟。能写下来给我确认吗？
turns.en: W-E-I. Wei. Could you write it down for me to confirm?
Sure. Check if this looks right on the screen.

title: Drive-Through Speaker
scene: 快餐得来速喇叭声音模糊，你听不清。

turns.cn: 对不起，喇叭不清楚，我开到窗口点可以吗？
turns.en: Sorry, the speaker's unclear. Can I order at the window?

turns.cn: 要一个巨无霸套餐，可乐换水。
turns.en: One Big Mac meal, swap Coke for water.

turns.cn: 十二块八，第一家窗口付款。
turns.en: Twelve eighty. Pay at the first window.

title: Confirm by Repeating Back
scene: 医生前台口头告诉你预约时间，你复述确认。

turns.cn: 下周三四点十五，史密斯医生。
turns.en: Next Wednesday at four fifteen with Dr. Smith.

turns.cn: 我确认一下：三月二十号，周三，下午四点十五，对吗？
turns.en: Let me confirm: March twentieth, Wednesday, four fifteen PM, right?

title: Heavy Accent
scene: 对方口音重，你礼貌请对方换种说法。

turns.cn: （快速指路）……turn at the light, ya know, the big ole building.
turns.en: …turn at the light, ya know, the big ole building.

turns.cn: 抱歉，我英语不太好，能再说简单一点吗？
turns.en: Sorry, my English isn't great. Could you say that more simply?

turns.cn: 红绿灯左转，白色教堂旁边。
turns.en: Left at the traffic light, by the white church.

title: Elevator Small Talk
scene: 电梯里邻居跟你闲聊天气，你简单回应。

turns.cn: 是啊，我差点忘了穿外套。
turns.en: Yeah. I almost forgot my jacket.

turns.cn: 希望别太大，我还得去超市。
turns.en: Hope it's not too bad. I still need to hit the grocery store.

turns.cn: 八楼，谢谢，Have a good one。
turns.en: Eight, please. Have a good one.

title: Excuse Me in Aisle
scene: 超市过道被挡，你礼貌请人让路。

turns.en: Excuse me. Could I get through?
Oh sorry. My cart was in the way.

turns.cn: 你找番茄酱？在那边尽头。
turns.en: Looking for ketchup? It's at the end there.

title: Bumped Into Someone
scene: 你走路看手机撞到人，赶紧道歉。

turns.cn: 天哪，非常抱歉！您没事吧？
turns.en: Oh gosh, I'm so sorry! Are you okay?
I'm fine. Just watch where you're going.

title: Hold the Door
scene: 你帮别人扶门，简单寒暄。

turns.en: I've got the door for you.

title: Ending a Chat
scene: 同事聊得正欢，但你有会要开，礼貌告辞。

turns.en: Going to the game this weekend?

turns.cn: 可能去，还没买票。我得走了，十点有会。
turns.en: Maybe, I haven't bought tickets yet. I gotta run, meeting at ten.
Sounds good. See you on Slack.

title: Write It Down Please
scene: 物业口头说一串步骤，你请对方写下来。

turns.cn: 先填表，再带ID去B窗口盖章，最后邮箱确认。
turns.en: Fill the form, get a stamp at window B with ID, then confirm by email.

turns.cn: 步骤有点多，能写在这张纸上吗？
turns.en: That's a lot. Could you write it on this paper?
What time does window B close today?

title: Coffee Line Chat
scene: 咖啡店排队，前面的人跟你闲聊。

turns.en: Yeah, but the coffee's worth it.
Two or three times a week on my way to work.
I recommend the oat milk latte.

title: Didn't Understand the Joke
scene: 同事讲了个玩笑你没听懂，诚实询问。

turns.en: …so the PM said that's a feature!

turns.cn: 不好意思，我没get到，能解释一下吗？
turns.en: Sorry, I didn't get it. Could you explain?

turns.cn: 就是说bug被说成新功能，行业老梗。
turns.en: It's when a bug gets called a new feature. Old industry joke.

turns.cn: 没事，我有时候也说太快。
turns.en: No worries. I talk too fast sometimes.

title: Fast Food Counter Rush
scene: 午餐高峰快餐店很吵，店员问你加什么。

turns.cn: 要加薯条还是沙拉？饮料多大？
turns.en: Fries or salad? What size drink?

turns.cn: 请等一下，你说薯条还是什么？
turns.en: One moment. Did you say fries or something else?

turns.cn: 好的，薯条，中杯可乐，在这吃。
turns.en: Okay. Fries, medium Coke, for here.

turns.cn: 九块五，请拿号牌等叫号。
turns.en: Nine fifty. Take a number and wait.

title: Is This the Right Line
scene: 你不确定是否排对窗口，问后面的人。

turns.cn: 不好意思，这是办驾照换新的队吗？
turns.en: Excuse me, is this the line for license renewal?
Yes, but you need a ticket from the kiosk first.
Oh, I didn't get one. Thanks for telling me.
Kiosk by the door. Pick renewal.
Got it. I'll grab a number.
Not too busy. Should be quick.

title: Over the Phone Bad Connection
scene: 手机信号不好，你听不清对方说什么。

turns.cn: 对不起，信号不好，您能大声一点吗？
turns.en: Sorry, bad signal. Could you speak up?

turns.cn: 我说改到周四下午三点。
turns.en: I said Thursday at three PM.

turns.cn: 周四三点，我重复一下对吗？
turns.en: Thursday three PM. Let me repeat that back.
